case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. RICHARD BRUNER ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-22-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
